name: Alain Kofune
description: Alain is the father of [Ushio](https://anilist.co/character/155712/Ushio-Kofune) and [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/155706/Mio-Kofune). He is from France and runs a restaurant called "Western Cuisine Kofune" in Hitogashima. For [Shinpei](https://anilist.co/character/155703/Ajiro-Shinpei), he is the adoptive father who welcomed him after he lost his parents in an accident. His wife, Kotoko, died after the birth of [Mio](https://anilist.co/character/155706/Mio-Kofune).
